Response: I've been using the app for about three months and overall it's fine, but I can never figure out where to go to update my billing information. Every time I try I end up in the wrong place.

Child Codes: billing navigation failure blocked self-service task
Need/Behavior: Customer needs a clear findable path to update billing details without getting lost.
Ambiguity/Notes: Overall experience described as fine — pain is specific to billing navigation. "Every time I try" confirms this is recurring not one-off.

Response: The integration with our other tools works really well most of the time, but it broke twice last month and we didn't get any warning or explanation.

Ambiguity/Notes: Motivation left blank: "we didn't get any warning or explanation" describes what was absent not what was desired — coding an expectation of proactive communication would require inferring a goal not stated by the participant.
